name: @memberjunction/remote-browser-server
description: MemberJunction: Server-tier coordination + execution for the Remote Browser channel — live CDP-connected browser sessions, control-mode arbitration (AgentOnly / ViewOnly / Collaborative), the viewport→screen-track seam, and the realtime BaseRealtimeChannelServer that gives a voice co-agent a browser. Composes RemoteBrowserEngineBase exactly as AIBridgeEngine composes AIBridgeEngineBase.
author: MemberJunction.com
